topDirs.public: Static assets served directly by the dev/build tool.

snapshot.overview: This appears to be a React application.
invariants: Keep component state and side effects explicit; avoid hidden global mutable state.
Do not call browser-only APIs during server-side or build-time execution.
Preserve component boundaries before extracting shared UI abstractions.
conventions: Treat package.json as the package manifest.
Treat src/main.* or src/index.* as the browser entry point when present.
Use framework/router conventions if this React app is also using Next, Remix, or another meta-framework.
